access_grant_sets_window_valid.name: access_grant_sets_window_valid
access_grant_sets_window_valid.value: "access_grant_sets"."starts_at" is null or "access_grant_sets"."expires_at" is null or "access_grant_sets"."starts_at" < "access_grant_sets"."expires_at"

access_grant_sets_terminal_state_valid.name: access_grant_sets_terminal_state_valid
access_grant_sets_terminal_state_valid.value: ("access_grant_sets"."state" = 'pending' and "access_grant_sets"."activated_at" is null and "access_grant_sets"."revoked_at" is null and "access_grant_sets"."expired_at" is null) or ("access_grant_sets"."state" = 'active' and "access_grant_sets"."activated_at" is not null and "access_grant_sets"."revoked_at" is null and "access_grant_sets"."expired_at" is null) or ("access_grant_sets"."state" = 'revoked' and "access_grant_sets"."activated_at" is not null and "access_grant_sets"."revoked_at" is not null and "access_grant_sets"."expired_at" is null) or ("access_grant_sets"."state" = 'expired' and "access_grant_sets"."activated_at" is not null and "access_grant_sets"."expired_at" is not null and "access_grant_sets"."revoked_at" is null)

access_grant_templates_key_valid.name: access_grant_templates_key_valid
access_grant_templates_key_valid.value: length("access_grant_templates"."template_key") between 1 and 100 and "access_grant_templates"."template_key" = lower(trim("access_grant_templates"."template_key")) and "access_grant_templates"."template_key" not glob '*[^a-z0-9-]*' and "access_grant_templates"."template_key" not like '-%' and "access_grant_templates"."template_key" not like '%-' and instr("access_grant_templates"."template_key", '--') = 0

access_grants_plan_link_valid.name: access_grants_plan_link_valid
access_grants_plan_link_valid.value: ("access_grants"."grant_set_id" is null and "access_grants"."access_plan_id" is null and "access_grants"."access_plan_item_id" is null) or ("access_grants"."grant_set_id" is not null and "access_grants"."access_plan_id" is not null and "access_grants"."access_plan_item_id" is not null)

access_grants_terminal_state_valid.name: access_grants_terminal_state_valid
access_grants_terminal_state_valid.value: ("access_grants"."state" = 'active' and "access_grants"."revoked_at" is null and "access_grants"."expired_at" is null) or ("access_grants"."state" = 'revoked' and "access_grants"."revoked_at" is not null and "access_grants"."expired_at" is null) or ("access_grants"."state" = 'expired' and "access_grants"."expired_at" is not null and "access_grants"."revoked_at" is null)

checkout_sessions_return_path_valid.name: checkout_sessions_return_path_valid
checkout_sessions_return_path_valid.value: substr("checkout_sessions"."return_path", 1, 1) = '/' and substr("checkout_sessions"."return_path", 1, 2) <> '//' and instr("checkout_sessions"."return_path", char(92)) = 0

checkout_sessions_provider_fields_valid.name: checkout_sessions_provider_fields_valid
checkout_sessions_provider_fields_valid.value:
(
        "checkout_sessions"."status" = 'creating'
        and "checkout_sessions"."stripe_checkout_session_id" is null
        and "checkout_sessions"."stripe_checkout_url" is null
      ) or (
        "checkout_sessions"."status" = 'failed'
        and (
          ("checkout_sessions"."stripe_checkout_session_id" is null and "checkout_sessions"."stripe_checkout_url" is null)
          or "checkout_sessions"."stripe_checkout_session_id" like 'cs_test_%'
        )
      ) or (
        "checkout_sessions"."status" in ('open', 'completed', 'expired', 'canceled')
        and "checkout_sessions"."stripe_checkout_session_id" like 'cs_test_%'
      )

commerce_events_failure_valid.name: commerce_events_failure_valid
commerce_events_failure_valid.value: ("commerce_events"."status" = 'failed' and "commerce_events"."failure_category" is not null) or ("commerce_events"."status" <> 'failed' and "commerce_events"."failure_category" is null)

commerce_products_subject_valid.name: commerce_products_subject_valid
commerce_products_subject_valid.value:
(
        "commerce_products"."product_type" in ('track', 'release', 'collection')
        and "commerce_products"."resource_type" = "commerce_products"."product_type"
        and "commerce_products"."resource_id" is not null
        and "commerce_products"."access_plan_id" is not null
        and "commerce_products"."access_plan_revision" > 0
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_revision_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_revision" is null
        and "commerce_products"."subscription_plan_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."credit_kind" is null
        and "commerce_products"."credit_quantity" is null
      ) or (
        "commerce_products"."product_type" = 'membership'
        and "commerce_products"."resource_type" is null
        and "commerce_products"."resource_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."access_plan_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."access_plan_revision" is null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_id" is not null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_revision_id" is not null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_revision" > 0
        and "commerce_products"."subscription_plan_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."credit_kind" is null
        and "commerce_products"."credit_quantity" is null
      ) or (
        "commerce_products"."product_type" = 'subscription'
        and "commerce_products"."resource_type" is null
        and "commerce_products"."resource_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."access_plan_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."access_plan_revision" is null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_revision_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_revision" is null
        and "commerce_products"."subscription_plan_id" is not null
        and "commerce_products"."credit_kind" is null
        and "commerce_products"."credit_quantity" is null
      ) or (
        "commerce_products"."product_type" = 'license'
        and "commerce_products"."resource_type" = 'track'
        and "commerce_products"."resource_id" is not null
        and "commerce_products"."access_plan_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."access_plan_revision" is null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_revision_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_revision" is null
        and "commerce_products"."subscription_plan_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."credit_kind" is null
        and "commerce_products"."credit_quantity" is null
      ) or (
        "commerce_products"."product_type" in ('download-credits', 'license-credits')
        and "commerce_products"."resource_type" is null
        and "commerce_products"."resource_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."access_plan_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."access_plan_revision" is null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_revision_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."membership_plan_revision" is null
        and "commerce_products"."subscription_plan_id" is null
        and "commerce_products"."credit_kind" = case "commerce_products"."product_type" when 'download-credits' then 'download' else 'license' end
        and "commerce_products"."credit_quantity" > 0
      )

contact_submissions_text_length_valid.name: contact_submissions_text_length_valid
contact_submissions_text_length_valid.value: length(trim("contact_submissions"."name")) between 1 and 160 and length(trim("contact_submissions"."email")) between 3 and 320 and length(trim("contact_submissions"."category")) between 1 and 80 and length(trim("contact_submissions"."subject")) between 1 and 240 and length(trim("contact_submissions"."message")) between 1 and 12000

content_sections_publication_fields_vali.name: content_sections_publication_fields_valid
content_sections_publication_fields_vali.value: ("content_sections"."publication_state" = 'published' and "content_sections"."published_revision_id" is not null and "content_sections"."published_at" is not null) or ("content_sections"."publication_state" <> 'published')

course_progress_completion_valid.name: course_progress_completion_valid
course_progress_completion_valid.value: ("course_progress"."state" = 'in_progress' and "course_progress"."completed_at" is null) or ("course_progress"."state" = 'completed' and "course_progress"."completed_at" is not null)

course_revisions_access_plan_valid.name: course_revisions_access_plan_valid
course_revisions_access_plan_valid.value: ("course_revisions"."access_plan_id" is null and "course_revisions"."access_plan_revision" is null) or ("course_revisions"."access_mode" = 'protected' and "course_revisions"."access_plan_id" is not null and "course_revisions"."access_plan_revision" > 0)

courses_publication_fields_valid.name: courses_publication_fields_valid
courses_publication_fields_valid.value: ("courses"."publication_state" = 'published' and "courses"."published_revision_id" is not null and "courses"."published_at" is not null) or ("courses"."publication_state" <> 'published')

credit_grant_lots_quantities_valid.name: credit_grant_lots_quantities_valid
credit_grant_lots_quantities_valid.value: "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_granted" > 0 and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_available" >= 0 and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_reserved" >= 0 and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_consumed" >= 0 and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_expired" >= 0 and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_reversed" >= 0 and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_available" + "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_reserved" + "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_consumed" + "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_expired" + "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_reversed" = "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_granted"

credit_grant_lots_state_valid.name: credit_grant_lots_state_valid
credit_grant_lots_state_valid.value:
(
        "credit_grant_lots"."state" = 'active'
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_available" + "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_reserved" > 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_expired" = 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_reversed" = 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."expired_at" is null
        and "credit_grant_lots"."reversed_at" is null
      ) or (
        "credit_grant_lots"."state" = 'exhausted'
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_available" = 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_reserved" = 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_expired" = 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_reversed" = 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."expired_at" is null
        and "credit_grant_lots"."reversed_at" is null
      ) or (
        "credit_grant_lots"."state" = 'expired'
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_available" = 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_reserved" = 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_expired" > 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_reversed" = 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."expired_at" is not null
        and "credit_grant_lots"."reversed_at" is null
      ) or (
        "credit_grant_lots"."state" = 'reversed'
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_available" = 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_reserved" = 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."quantity_reversed" > 0
        and "credit_grant_lots"."reversed_at" is not null
      )

credit_ledger_entries_delta_valid.name: credit_ledger_entries_delta_valid
credit_ledger_entries_delta_valid.value:
(
        "credit_ledger_entries"."entry_type" = 'grant'
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."available_delta" > 0
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."reserved_delta" = 0
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."consumed_delta" = 0
      ) or (
        "credit_ledger_entries"."entry_type" = 'reservation'
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."available_delta" < 0
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."reserved_delta" = -"credit_ledger_entries"."available_delta"
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."consumed_delta" = 0
      ) or (
        "credit_ledger_entries"."entry_type" = 'consumption'
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."available_delta" = 0
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."reserved_delta" < 0
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."consumed_delta" = -"credit_ledger_entries"."reserved_delta"
      ) or (
        "credit_ledger_entries"."entry_type" = 'release'
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."available_delta" > 0
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."reserved_delta" = -"credit_ledger_entries"."available_delta"
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."consumed_delta" = 0
      ) or (
        "credit_ledger_entries"."entry_type" = 'reversal'
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."available_delta" > 0
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."reserved_delta" = 0
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."consumed_delta" = -"credit_ledger_entries"."available_delta"
      ) or (
        "credit_ledger_entries"."entry_type" = 'expiration'
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."available_delta" < 0
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."reserved_delta" = 0
        and "credit_ledger_entries"."consumed_delta" = 0
      )

credit_reservations_terminal_state_valid.name: credit_reservations_terminal_state_valid
credit_reservations_terminal_state_valid.value:
(
        "credit_reservations"."state" = 'reserved'
        and "credit_reservations"."consumed_at" is null
        and "credit_reservations"."released_at" is null
        and "credit_reservations"."expired_at" is null
        and "credit_reservations"."reversed_at" is null
      ) or (
        "credit_reservations"."state" = 'consumed'
        and "credit_reservations"."consumed_at" is not null
        and "credit_reservations"."released_at" is null
        and "credit_reservations"."expired_at" is null
        and "credit_reservations"."reversed_at" is null
      ) or (
        "credit_reservations"."state" = 'released'
        and "credit_reservations"."released_at" is not null
        and "credit_reservations"."expired_at" is null
        and "credit_reservations"."reversed_at" is null
      ) or (
        "credit_reservations"."state" = 'expired'
        and "credit_reservations"."expired_at" is not null
        and "credit_reservations"."reversed_at" is null
      ) or (
        "credit_reservations"."state" = 'reversed'
        and "credit_reservations"."consumed_at" is not null
        and "credit_reservations"."reversed_at" is not null
      )

credits_one_subject.name: credits_one_subject
credits_one_subject.value: (("credits"."release_revision_id" is not null) + ("credits"."track_revision_id" is not null) + ("credits"."collection_revision_id" is not null)) = 1

download_events_entitlement_source_valid.name: download_events_entitlement_source_valid
download_events_entitlement_source_valid.value:
(
        "download_events"."entitlement_id" is null
        and "download_events"."entitlement_source_type" is null
        and "download_events"."entitlement_source_id" is null
      ) or (
        "download_events"."entitlement_id" is not null
        and (
          ("download_events"."entitlement_source_type" is null and "download_events"."entitlement_source_id" is null)
          or
          ("download_events"."entitlement_source_type" is not null and "download_events"."entitlement_source_id" is not null)
        )
      )

download_events_commerce_environment_val.name: download_events_commerce_environment_valid
download_events_commerce_environment_val.value:
(
        "download_events"."access_source" in ('order', 'membership', 'subscription', 'license', 'credit')
        and "download_events"."stripe_environment" = 'test'
        and "download_events"."livemode" = 0
      ) or (
        "download_events"."access_source" not in ('order', 'membership', 'subscription', 'license', 'credit')
        and "download_events"."stripe_environment" is null
        and "download_events"."livemode" is null
      )

entitlements_grant_source_valid.name: entitlements_grant_source_valid
entitlements_grant_source_valid.value:
(
        ("entitlements"."source_type" = 'grant' and "entitlements"."grant_id" is not null and "entitlements"."source_id" = "entitlements"."grant_id")
        or
        ("entitlements"."source_type" <> 'grant' and "entitlements"."grant_id" is null)
      )

entitlements_commerce_environment_valid.name: entitlements_commerce_environment_valid
entitlements_commerce_environment_valid.value:
(
        "entitlements"."source_type" = 'grant'
        and "entitlements"."stripe_environment" is null
        and "entitlements"."livemode" is null
        and "entitlements"."fulfillment_event_id" is null
      ) or (
        "entitlements"."source_type" <> 'grant'
        and "entitlements"."stripe_environment" = 'test'
        and "entitlements"."livemode" = 0
        and "entitlements"."fulfillment_event_id" is not null
      ) or (
        "entitlements"."source_type" not in ('grant', 'order')
        and "entitlements"."stripe_environment" = 'test'
        and "entitlements"."livemode" = 0
        and "entitlements"."fulfillment_event_id" is null
        and "entitlements"."last_operation_key" is not null
      ) or (
        "entitlements"."source_type" <> 'grant'
        and "entitlements"."stripe_environment" is null
        and "entitlements"."livemode" is null
        and "entitlements"."fulfillment_event_id" is null
        and "entitlements"."last_operation_key" is null
      )

export_manifests_export_key_valid.name: export_manifests_export_key_valid
export_manifests_export_key_valid.value: length("export_manifests"."export_key") between 16 and 160 and "export_manifests"."export_key" not glob '*[^a-zA-Z0-9:_-]*'

export_manifests_hash_valid.name: export_manifests_hash_valid
export_manifests_hash_valid.value: "export_manifests"."manifest_sha256" is null or (length("export_manifests"."manifest_sha256") = 64 and "export_manifests"."manifest_sha256" = lower("export_manifests"."manifest_sha256") and "export_manifests"."manifest_sha256" not glob '*[^0-9a-f]*')

export_manifests_failure_code_safe.name: export_manifests_failure_code_safe
export_manifests_failure_code_safe.value: "export_manifests"."safe_failure_code" is null or (length("export_manifests"."safe_failure_code") between 1 and 96 and "export_manifests"."safe_failure_code" = upper("export_manifests"."safe_failure_code") and "export_manifests"."safe_failure_code" not glob '*[^A-Z0-9_]*')

export_manifests_lifecycle_consistent.name: export_manifests_lifecycle_consistent
export_manifests_lifecycle_consistent.value: ("export_manifests"."status" = 'preparing' and "export_manifests"."manifest_sha256" is null and "export_manifests"."verified_at" is null and "export_manifests"."safe_failure_code" is null) or ("export_manifests"."status" = 'ready' and "export_manifests"."manifest_sha256" is not null and "export_manifests"."verified_at" is null and "export_manifests"."safe_failure_code" is null) or ("export_manifests"."status" = 'verified' and "export_manifests"."manifest_sha256" is not null and "export_manifests"."verified_at" is not null and "export_manifests"."safe_failure_code" is null) or ("export_manifests"."status" = 'failed' and "export_manifests"."verified_at" is null and "export_manifests"."safe_failure_code" is not null)

favorites_exact_target.name: favorites_exact_target
favorites_exact_target.value:
(
        ("favorites"."target_type" = 'track' and "favorites"."track_id" is not null and "favorites"."release_id" is null)
        or
        ("favorites"."target_type" = 'release' and "favorites"."release_id" is not null and "favorites"."track_id" is null)
      )

fulfillment_events_failure_valid.name: fulfillment_events_failure_valid
fulfillment_events_failure_valid.value: ("fulfillment_events"."status" = 'failed' and "fulfillment_events"."failure_category" is not null) or ("fulfillment_events"."status" <> 'failed' and "fulfillment_events"."failure_category" is null)

issued_licenses_source_links_valid.name: issued_licenses_source_links_valid
issued_licenses_source_links_valid.value:
(
        "issued_licenses"."source" = 'owner_approval'
        and "issued_licenses"."order_id" is null
        and "issued_licenses"."credit_ledger_entry_id" is null
        and "issued_licenses"."fulfillment_event_id" is null
      ) or (
        "issued_licenses"."source" = 'credit_redemption'
        and "issued_licenses"."order_id" is null
        and "issued_licenses"."credit_ledger_entry_id" is not null
        and "issued_licenses"."fulfillment_event_id" is null
      ) or (
        "issued_licenses"."source" = 'stripe_test_order'
        and "issued_licenses"."order_id" is not null
        and "issued_licenses"."credit_ledger_entry_id" is null
        and "issued_licenses"."fulfillment_event_id" is not null
      )

issued_licenses_state_valid.name: issued_licenses_state_valid
issued_licenses_state_valid.value:
(
        "issued_licenses"."state" = 'active'
        and "issued_licenses"."revoked_at" is null
        and "issued_licenses"."expired_at" is null
      ) or (
        "issued_licenses"."state" = 'revoked'
        and "issued_licenses"."revoked_at" is not null
        and "issued_licenses"."expired_at" is null
      ) or (
        "issued_licenses"."state" = 'expired'
        and "issued_licenses"."expired_at" is not null
        and "issued_licenses"."revoked_at" is null
      )

legal_document_versions_content_present.name: legal_document_versions_content_present
legal_document_versions_content_present.value: length(trim("legal_document_versions"."title")) between 1 and 160 and length(trim("legal_document_versions"."body_text")) between 1 and 40000 and length("legal_document_versions"."introduction") <= 4000

legal_document_versions_approval_consist.name: legal_document_versions_approval_consistent
legal_document_versions_approval_consist.value: ("legal_document_versions"."approved_by_user_id" is null and "legal_document_versions"."approved_at" is null) or ("legal_document_versions"."approved_by_user_id" is not null and "legal_document_versions"."approved_at" is not null)

legal_documents_publication_consistent.name: legal_documents_publication_consistent
legal_documents_publication_consistent.value: ("legal_documents"."published_version_id" is null and "legal_documents"."published_at" is null) or ("legal_documents"."published_version_id" is not null and "legal_documents"."published_at" is not null)

lesson_items_media_valid.name: lesson_items_media_valid
lesson_items_media_valid.value: ("lesson_items"."item_type" in ('text', 'prompt') and "lesson_items"."media_derivative_id" is null) or ("lesson_items"."item_type" in ('image', 'audio', 'video', 'download') and "lesson_items"."media_derivative_id" is not null)

license_document_jobs_lease_valid.name: license_document_jobs_lease_valid
license_document_jobs_lease_valid.value: ("license_document_jobs"."status" = 'processing' and "license_document_jobs"."worker_id" is not null and "license_document_jobs"."lease_token" is not null and "license_document_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is not null) or ("license_document_jobs"."status" <> 'processing' and "license_document_jobs"."lease_token" is null and "license_document_jobs"."lease_expires_at" is null)

license_document_jobs_failure_valid.name: license_document_jobs_failure_valid
license_document_jobs_failure_valid.value: ("license_document_jobs"."status" = 'failed' and "license_document_jobs"."failure_category" is not null) or ("license_document_jobs"."status" <> 'failed' and "license_document_jobs"."failure_category" is null)

license_documents_result_valid.name: license_documents_result_valid
license_documents_result_valid.value:
(
        "license_documents"."state" in ('queued', 'processing')
        and "license_documents"."media_object_id" is null
        and "license_documents"."content_digest" is null
        and "license_documents"."byte_length" is null
        and "license_documents"."failure_category" is null
      ) or (
        "license_documents"."state" = 'ready'
        and "license_documents"."content_digest" is not null
        and length("license_documents"."content_digest") = 64
        and "license_documents"."byte_length" > 0
        and "license_documents"."failure_category" is null
      ) or (
        "license_documents"."state" = 'failed'
        and "license_documents"."media_object_id" is null
        and "license_documents"."content_digest" is null
        and "license_documents"."byte_length" is null
        and "license_documents"."failure_category" is not null
      )

license_events_subject_valid.name: license_events_subject_valid
license_events_subject_valid.value: "license_events"."license_request_id" is not null or "license_events"."issued_license_id" is not null

license_options_limits_positive.name: license_options_limits_positive
license_options_limits_positive.value: ("license_options"."max_audience" is null or "license_options"."max_audience" > 0) and ("license_options"."max_copies" is null or "license_options"."max_copies" > 0) and ("license_options"."term_months" is null or "license_options"."term_months" > 0)

license_requests_text_length_valid.name: license_requests_text_length_valid
license_requests_text_length_valid.value: length(trim("license_requests"."licensee_name")) between 1 and 160 and length(trim("license_requests"."project_title")) between 1 and 240 and length(trim("license_requests"."intended_use")) between 1 and 2000 and length(trim("license_requests"."project_description")) between 1 and 12000

license_requests_terminal_state_valid.name: license_requests_terminal_state_valid
license_requests_terminal_state_valid.value:
(
        "license_requests"."state" in ('draft', 'submitted', 'pending_approval')
        and "license_requests"."approved_at" is null
        and "license_requests"."rejected_at" is null
        and "license_requests"."canceled_at" is null
        and "license_requests"."issued_at" is null
      ) or (
        "license_requests"."state" = 'approved'
        and "license_requests"."approved_by_user_id" is not null
        and "license_requests"."approved_at" is not null
        and "license_requests"."rejected_at" is null
        and "license_requests"."canceled_at" is null
        and "license_requests"."issued_at" is null
      ) or (
        "license_requests"."state" = 'rejected'
        and "license_requests"."rejected_by_user_id" is not null
        and "license_requests"."rejected_at" is not null
        and "license_requests"."canceled_at" is null
        and "license_requests"."issued_at" is null
      ) or (
        "license_requests"."state" = 'canceled'
        and "license_requests"."canceled_at" is not null
        and "license_requests"."issued_at" is null
      ) or (
        "license_requests"."state" = 'issued'
        and "license_requests"."issued_at" is not null
      )

media_derivatives_ready_complete.name: media_derivatives_ready_complete
media_derivatives_ready_complete.value: "media_derivatives"."status" != 'ready' or ("media_derivatives"."object_key" is not null and "media_derivatives"."content_type" is not null and "media_derivatives"."byte_length" is not null)

membership_plan_revisions_access_plan_va.name: membership_plan_revisions_access_plan_valid
membership_plan_revisions_access_plan_va.value: ("membership_plan_revisions"."access_plan_id" is null and "membership_plan_revisions"."access_plan_revision" is null) or ("membership_plan_revisions"."access_plan_id" is not null and "membership_plan_revisions"."access_plan_revision" > 0)

memberships_source_links_valid.name: memberships_source_links_valid
memberships_source_links_valid.value: ("memberships"."source" = 'owner' and "memberships"."source_order_id" is null and "memberships"."source_fulfillment_event_id" is null) or ("memberships"."source" = 'stripe_test' and "memberships"."source_order_id" is not null and "memberships"."source_fulfillment_event_id" is not null)

memberships_terminal_state_valid.name: memberships_terminal_state_valid
memberships_terminal_state_valid.value:
(
        "memberships"."state" in ('pending', 'active', 'paused')
        and "memberships"."cancel_at" is null
        and "memberships"."canceled_at" is null
        and "memberships"."expired_at" is null
      ) or (
        "memberships"."state" = 'cancellation_scheduled'
        and "memberships"."cancel_at" is not null
        and "memberships"."canceled_at" is null
        and "memberships"."expired_at" is null
      ) or (
        "memberships"."state" = 'canceled'
        and "memberships"."canceled_at" is not null
        and "memberships"."expired_at" is null
      ) or (
        "memberships"."state" = 'expired'
        and "memberships"."expired_at" is not null
        and "memberships"."canceled_at" is null
      )

operational_failures_code_safe.name: operational_failures_code_safe
operational_failures_code_safe.value: length("operational_failures"."code") between 1 and 96 and "operational_failures"."code" = upper("operational_failures"."code") and "operational_failures"."code" not glob '*[^A-Z0-9_]*'

operational_failures_subject_consistent.name: operational_failures_subject_consistent
operational_failures_subject_consistent.value: ("operational_failures"."subject_type" is null and "operational_failures"."subject_id" is null) or ("operational_failures"."subject_type" is not null and "operational_failures"."subject_id" is not null)

orders_source_link_valid.name: orders_source_link_valid
orders_source_link_valid.value: "orders"."checkout_session_id" is not null or ("orders"."stripe_subscription_id" is not null and "orders"."stripe_subscription_id" like 'sub_%')

setup_applications_result_fingerprint_va.name: setup_applications_result_fingerprint_valid
setup_applications_result_fingerprint_va.value: "setup_applications"."result_state_fingerprint" is null or (length("setup_applications"."result_state_fingerprint") = 64 and "setup_applications"."result_state_fingerprint" = lower("setup_applications"."result_state_fingerprint") and "setup_applications"."result_state_fingerprint" not glob '*[^0-9a-f]*')

setup_applications_failure_code_safe.name: setup_applications_failure_code_safe
setup_applications_failure_code_safe.value: "setup_applications"."safe_failure_code" is null or (length("setup_applications"."safe_failure_code") between 1 and 96 and "setup_applications"."safe_failure_code" = upper("setup_applications"."safe_failure_code") and "setup_applications"."safe_failure_code" not glob '*[^A-Z0-9_]*')

setup_applications_completion_consistent.name: setup_applications_completion_consistent
setup_applications_completion_consistent.value: ("setup_applications"."status" = 'applying' and "setup_applications"."completed_at" is null and "setup_applications"."result_state_fingerprint" is null and "setup_applications"."safe_failure_code" is null) or ("setup_applications"."status" = 'applied' and "setup_applications"."completed_at" is not null and "setup_applications"."result_state_fingerprint" is not null and "setup_applications"."safe_failure_code" is null) or ("setup_applications"."status" = 'failed' and "setup_applications"."completed_at" is not null and "setup_applications"."safe_failure_code" is not null)

setup_state_proposal_pair_consistent.name: setup_state_proposal_pair_consistent
setup_state_proposal_pair_consistent.value: ("setup_state"."proposal_schema_version" is null and "setup_state"."last_proposal_hash" is null) or ("setup_state"."proposal_schema_version" is not null and "setup_state"."proposal_schema_version" > 0 and length("setup_state"."last_proposal_hash") = 64 and "setup_state"."last_proposal_hash" = lower("setup_state"."last_proposal_hash") and "setup_state"."last_proposal_hash" not glob '*[^0-9a-f]*')

setup_state_fingerprint_valid.name: setup_state_fingerprint_valid
setup_state_fingerprint_valid.value: "setup_state"."state_fingerprint" is null or (length("setup_state"."state_fingerprint") = 64 and "setup_state"."state_fingerprint" = lower("setup_state"."state_fingerprint") and "setup_state"."state_fingerprint" not glob '*[^0-9a-f]*')

subscription_events_state_valid.name: subscription_events_state_valid
subscription_events_state_valid.value: ("subscription_events"."from_state" is null or "subscription_events"."from_state" in ('pending', 'active', 'paused', 'cancellation_scheduled', 'canceled', 'expired')) and "subscription_events"."to_state" in ('pending', 'active', 'paused', 'cancellation_scheduled', 'canceled', 'expired')

subscription_events_provider_valid.name: subscription_events_provider_valid
subscription_events_provider_valid.value: ("subscription_events"."source" = 'owner' and "subscription_events"."stripe_event_id" is null and "subscription_events"."provider_object_id" is null and "subscription_events"."fulfillment_event_id" is null) or ("subscription_events"."source" = 'stripe_test' and "subscription_events"."stripe_event_id" like 'evt_%' and "subscription_events"."provider_object_id" is not null and "subscription_events"."fulfillment_event_id" is not null)

subscriptions_source_fields_valid.name: subscriptions_source_fields_valid
subscriptions_source_fields_valid.value: ("subscriptions"."source" = 'owner' and "subscriptions"."stripe_subscription_id" is null and "subscriptions"."stripe_customer_id" is null and "subscriptions"."commerce_product_id" is null and "subscriptions"."commerce_price_id" is null) or ("subscriptions"."source" = 'stripe_test' and "subscriptions"."stripe_subscription_id" like 'sub_%' and "subscriptions"."commerce_product_id" is not null and "subscriptions"."commerce_price_id" is not null)

subscriptions_cancellation_valid.name: subscriptions_cancellation_valid
subscriptions_cancellation_valid.value:
(
        "subscriptions"."state" in ('pending', 'active', 'paused')
        and "subscriptions"."cancel_at_period_end" = 0
        and "subscriptions"."cancel_at" is null
        and "subscriptions"."canceled_at" is null
        and "subscriptions"."expired_at" is null
      ) or (
        "subscriptions"."state" = 'cancellation_scheduled'
        and "subscriptions"."cancel_at_period_end" = 1
        and "subscriptions"."cancel_at" is not null
        and "subscriptions"."canceled_at" is null
        and "subscriptions"."expired_at" is null
      ) or (
        "subscriptions"."state" = 'canceled'
        and "subscriptions"."canceled_at" is not null
        and "subscriptions"."expired_at" is null
      ) or (
        "subscriptions"."state" = 'expired'
        and "subscriptions"."expired_at" is not null
        and "subscriptions"."canceled_at" is null
      )

telemetry_aggregate_days_counts_valid.name: telemetry_aggregate_days_counts_valid
telemetry_aggregate_days_counts_valid.value: "telemetry_aggregate_days"."source_event_count" > 0 and "telemetry_aggregate_days"."group_count" > 0 and "telemetry_aggregate_days"."session_count" > 0 and "telemetry_aggregate_days"."linked_user_count" >= 0 and "telemetry_aggregate_days"."group_count" <= "telemetry_aggregate_days"."source_event_count" and "telemetry_aggregate_days"."session_count" <= "telemetry_aggregate_days"."source_event_count" and "telemetry_aggregate_days"."linked_user_count" <= "telemetry_aggregate_days"."session_count"

updates_resource_valid.name: updates_resource_valid
updates_resource_valid.value: ("updates"."resource_type" is null and "updates"."resource_id" is null) or ("updates"."resource_type" in ('track', 'release', 'collection', 'course', 'video', 'page', 'license', 'membership', 'subscription', 'order') and "updates"."resource_id" is not null)

video_revisions_delivery_fields_valid.name: video_revisions_delivery_fields_valid
video_revisions_delivery_fields_valid.value: ("video_revisions"."delivery_kind" = 'artist_hosted' and "video_revisions"."hosted_derivative_id" is not null and "video_revisions"."external_provider" is null and "video_revisions"."external_embed_url" is null) or ("video_revisions"."delivery_kind" = 'external' and "video_revisions"."hosted_derivative_id" is null and "video_revisions"."external_provider" is not null and "video_revisions"."external_embed_url" is not null)

videos_publication_fields_valid.name: videos_publication_fields_valid
videos_publication_fields_valid.value: ("videos"."publication_state" = 'published' and "videos"."published_revision_id" is not null and "videos"."published_at" is not null) or ("videos"."publication_state" <> 'published')
